about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Lukas Schaffrath – web developer with a technical teaching degree from RWTH Aachen University and a passion for digital solutions. What started as a student side job became my calling: developing modern, powerful, and affordable websites.

During my studies, I worked as a web developer and research assistant at RWTH. Today, I manage various technical projects as IT Administrator at the Institute of English Studies and work independently on web projects under the name webCommits web Designs.

I focus on sustainable, clean code and user-friendly concepts. Whether with classic web technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript or frameworks like Django, Ruby on Rails, Eleventy, and Symfony. I particularly enjoy supporting smaller businesses with individual solutions. I combine my technical expertise with pedagogical sensitivity and clear communication. Because good web development starts with understanding the people behind it.

xrnexus.title: XR Nexus
xrnexus.description: A reactive, professional 3D and 2D planning tool with AI integration for XR-Essential. Built with SparkJS, ThreeJS, and Vite. Hosted with Traefik, Docker-Compose, and Supabase.

trackable.title: trackable.
trackable.description: Self-hosted time tracking PWA for freelancers and small teams. Features multiple profiles, monthly PDF/CSV exports, vacation tracking, and automated email reports.

webcommits.title: webCommits
webcommits.description: My company for web development and digital services. In addition to custom websites, I offer seminars on AI in education and teaching, as well as IT consulting.

rueckenwind.title: Rückenwind Reise
rueckenwind.description: An overview page with a Linktree replacement for our favourite YouTubers — includes login, admin panel, interactive UI, and animations.

gpupgrade.title: GPUpgrade
gpupgrade.description: Web tool for analyzing and comparing GPU performance with upgrade calculator, search, and filter functions. Built with Eleventy (11ty), AlpineJS, JavaScript, and JSON database by u/SenorPeterz.

anglistikweb.title: Anglistik Web
anglistikweb.description: Office hours and booking system for RWTH Aachen University with login and account management. Based on Django and Python.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: My personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built with React, GSAP for animations, and a modern, responsive design. Check it out on GitHub! (Branch: redesign)

spotifydl.title: Sonus
spotifydl.description: Self-hosted Docker service to download Spotify playlists as MP3. Responsive web UI, automatic playlist monitoring, CSV import, and Spotify OAuth integration. Uses yt-dlp for downloads and FastAPI in the backend.

lashesbydim.title: Lashes by Dim
lashesbydim.description: Interactive website for a lash stylist

benbachmair.title: Ben-Bachmair
benbachmair.description: Website of an internationally renowned professor & author, based on Vue.js.

anzeigeschalten.title: AnzeigeSchalten
anzeigeschalten.description: A website that simplifies the process of placing ads. Created as a PWA specifically for my grandparents.

mdtopdf.title: MD to HTML/PDF Converter
mdtopdf.description: A GUI Python app that converts Markdown files to HTML or PDF. Built with Tkinter and Pandoc. With merge and export functionality for multiple files.

notion.title: Notion to Obsidian Transition Tool
notion.description: A small script that helps with the transition from Notion to Obsidian through smart file conversion.

snakegame.title: Snake Game
snakegame.description: A simple Snake clone written in Python with PyGame. Created as a self-study programming project during a didactics course.

weeklyplanner.title: Weekly Planner Web
weeklyplanner.description: Self-hostable, web-based weekly planner for companies featuring account creation, an admin panel, and a responsive interface for organizing tasks and appointments.

experienceItems.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
experienceItems.description: Full-stack web development across various projects, server infrastructure setup, AI integration, and media design.

experienceItems.description: Freelance full-stack web development using various modern technologies under the name webCommits web Designs.

experienceItems.title: IT Administrator

experienceItems.title: Project Manager (Working Student)

experienceItems.title: Tutor
experienceItems.description: Tutoring in English, German, and Computer Science for students of various grade levels and vocational students.

experienceItems.title: Research Assistant
experienceItems.organization: Institute of English and American Studies, RWTH Aachen
experienceItems.description: Development of the web-based self-study course "Virtual Acoustic Immersion for Advanced Bachelor's Students of English".

experienceItems.title: Internships & Part-time Jobs
experienceItems.organization: including Media Markt, api GmbH, Dampfzebra
experienceItems.description: Experience in retail, customer consulting, logistics, as well as technical support and software development.
